faqs.question: Why do I have a fly problem in my Windsor Terrace home?
faqs.answer: Flies are attracted to food sources, organic waste, and moisture. In Windsor Terrace, common causes include nearby garbage areas, compost bins, pet waste, proximity to Prospect Park's natural areas, and aging building infrastructure that may have small entry points. Our inspection identifies the specific causes in your property and addresses them effectively.
